limitations: ai_investment_intensity: The $311M capex figure is not AI-attributable; 'data and technology' and 'automation' are mentioned but not linked to AI specifically. Score reflects generic AI investment language only.

ai_narrative_concreteness: AI appears only as an external threat vector (cyberattacks, fake content), not as a company-deployed technology. Score 1 reflects boilerplate/buzzword-level mention with no named AI initiative.

ai_risk_disclosure_depth: Risk-section content is present. AI is named in two specific risk categories (cybersecurity threat amplification and brand/reputation harm from AI-generated content), qualifying as named company-relevant risk categories rather than pure boilerplate.
